intro: Play fast-paced 1v1 baseball where your parents wouldn’t let you. Smash windows, wreck the house, and dodge the chaos in this arcade-style baseball game
description:
Indoor Baseball Features:
-Each indoor field has its own wild ways to crush home runs and cause chaos
-Choose from 16 unique characters, each with their own stats and playstyle
-12+ indoor fields packed with hazards, obstacles, and gameplay twists
-Jump into Story Mode and see if you’ve got what it takes to make the school's baseball team
-Take a break with 7 crazy Mini Games like Keepy Uppy, Cutting the Grass, and Toddler Tag
-Play a 12 game Season Mode with playoffs and a Championship Game
-Compete in Moonshot Mayhem—rack up points with home runs and destruction
-Challenge a friend and play 1v1 local multiplayer
